ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "current_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "career_high_ranking" INTEGER /* Highest ranking achieved by the player in their career */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "dominant_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player (right or left) */,
  "playing_style" TEXT /* Playing style of the player (e.g., aggressive, defensive) */,
  "career_total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the player over their career */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the player's current injury, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Surface type of the tournament (e.g., clay, hard, grass) */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the tournament */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors of the tournament */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the game is played */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the tournament (e.g., Quarterfinals, Semifinals) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the game */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the game */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning player */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first player */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second player */,
  "court_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court type where the game is played */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics in a game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces by the player */,
  "double_faults" INTEGER /* Number of double faults by the player */,
  "first_serve_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of first serves successfully landed */,
  "second_serve_points_won" REAL /* Percentage of points won on second serve */,
  "break_points_saved" INTEGER /* Number of break points saved by the player */,
  "service_games_won" INTEGER /* Number of service games won by the player */,
  "return_games_won" INTEGER /* Number of return games won by the player */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player (singles and doubles) */,
  "ppga" REAL /* Personal points per game average */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage in singles games */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Player rating */,
  "first_serve_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the player's first serve */,
  "second_serve_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the player's second serve */,
  "forehand_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of points won on forehand */,
  "backhand_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of points won on backhand */,
  "net_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of points won at the net */,
  "break_points_faced" INTEGER /* Number of break points faced by the player */,
  "service_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of service games played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* Home city of the team */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position in the team (e.g., captain, vice-captain) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status in the team (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_games" (
  "team_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-based game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the game */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_games_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics in a game */,
  "team_game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team-based game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces by the team */,
  "double_faults" INTEGER /* Number of double faults by the team */,
  "first_serve_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of first serves successfully landed */,
  "second_serve_points_won" REAL /* Percentage of points won on second serve */,
  "break_points_saved" INTEGER /* Number of break points saved by the team */,
  "service_games_won" INTEGER /* Number of service games won by the team */,
  "return_games_won" INTEGER /* Number of return games won by the team */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team (singles and doubles) */,
  "ppga" REAL /* Personal points per game average */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage in singles games */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Team rating */,
  "team_first_serve_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the team's first serve */,
  "team_second_serve_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the team's second serve */,
  "team_forehand_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of points won on forehand by the team */,
  "team_backhand_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of points won on backhand by the team */,
  "team_net_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of points won at the net by the team */,
  "team_break_points_faced" INTEGER /* Number of break points faced by the team */,
  "team_service_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of service games played by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_game_id") REFERENCES team_games ("team_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (if the user is a player) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played in each round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_types" (
  "court_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court type */,
  "court_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the court type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the court type */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the court type (e.g., slow, medium, fast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_courts" (
  "game_court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game court */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "court_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court type */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the court */,
  "lighting" TEXT /* Lighting available (e.g., day, night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_courts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_courts_court_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_type_id") REFERENCES court_types ("court_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance metrics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "total_aces" INTEGER /* Total aces */,
  "total_double_faults" INTEGER /* Total double faults */,
  "average_first_serve_percentage" REAL /* Average percentage of first serves successfully landed */,
  "average_second_serve_points_won" REAL /* Average percentage of points won on second serve */,
  "average_break_points_saved" REAL /* Average number of break points saved */,
  "average_service_games_won" REAL /* Average number of service games won */,
  "average_return_games_won" REAL /* Average number of return games won */,
  "average_ppga" REAL /* Average personal points per game average */,
  "average_win_percentage" REAL /* Average win percentage in singles games */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average player rating */,
  "total_service_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of service games played */,
  "total_break_points_faced" INTEGER /* Total number of break points faced */,
  "total_net_points_won" INTEGER /* Total number of points won at the net */,
  "total_forehand_win_percentage" REAL /* Average percentage of points won on forehand */,
  "total_backhand_win_percentage" REAL /* Average percentage of points won on backhand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
